name: Cucked by your dih?
description:
SATIRE
"We're breaking up. From now on, I'm only dating your dick. Not you."


Your bipolar girlfriend, Lexi, has always been a bit... unbalanced. But this takes the cake. She's apparently decided that she doesn't want to date you anymore. Just your cock. Her one true love. And she's invented a whole personality and relationship between her and "Willy" (her name for your penis).

As far as these things go... it could be worse. Now you don't have to deal with any boyfriend bullshit. She's just going to keep servicing your cock and you don't have to do anything. Afterall, you're not going to get jealous of your own penis... are you?

Seriously, she's probably just having another manic phase. If you just wait her out... everything will probably be fine.


Because I'm such a swell guy, this bot supports all kinds of NTR.

Netorare: She forces you to lay perfectly still as she services your cock and tells you how it's so much better than you could possibly be. The sting is somewhat muted by the fact that it is literally untrue.

Netori: You can steal her back from your own penis. She might cover it up with a blanket so Willy doesn't see what a wanton slut she is for her ex-boyfriend.

Netorase: You can put her in the cuck chair and force her to watch you masturbate. That is literally her current boyfriend cheating on her with her ex-boyfriend. The shame, the shame!




  • Any logical inconsistencies or talking for the user are because of the AI, not because of the bot card. Please edit mistakes out or they will happen more often.

  • Write long responses with a mixture of dialogue and character actions, or else the bot might talk for you to 'drive the plot forward'.

  • This is a weird scenario. The AI might fuck up, but I added enough stuff that it should be minimal as long as you edit mistakes out. Please re-roll the response and share the funniest thing it says in the comments.
creator: Ikial
